name: River Resolve
description: Stream finding its calm pool after flowing rapids

simple: mountain stream settling into a calm pool
standard: mountain stream settling into a calm pool
water flowing over smooth stones to peaceful rest
river current slowing to gentle lapping at the shore
detailed: mountain stream settling into a calm pool
water flowing over smooth stones to peaceful rest
river current slowing to gentle lapping at the shore
waterfall mist settling into still pond surface
brook babble resolving into tranquil silence
